ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration property (e.g., boolean, list) */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of allowed values for the property */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration property */,
  "command_line_equivalent" TEXT /* Command-line equivalent for the configuration property */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the configuration is associated with */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration setting */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration file */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the configuration file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the configuration file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration file (e.g., TCL, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_files_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_speed_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device speed grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the device speed grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device speed grade */,
  "speed_grade" TEXT /* Speed grade value (e.g., -3, -2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_device_speed" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device speed grade */,
  "speed_grade_value" TEXT /* Speed grade value for the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architecture_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture file */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the architecture file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the architecture file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the architecture file (e.g., VHDL, Verilog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_architecture_files_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity file */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the entity file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the entity file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity file (e.g., VHDL, Verilog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_files_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_changes_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed or modified the configuration */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit event occurred */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit event (e.g., access, modification) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
